title: Butler University Welcomes Seven New Trustees to Its Board of Trustees
summary_en: Seven new leaders—including five Butler alumni—will join the University’s Board of Trustees, bringing expertise in healthcare, education, business, and finance to help guide Butler’s continued progress through Boldly Butler.  As Butler University advances its strategic vision through Boldly Butler, seven accomplished leaders will soon join the University’s Board of Trustees, contributing perspecti
author: Katie Palmer Wharton '14
title_cn: 巴特勒大学董事会迎来7名新任董事

title: The University Is Not Prepared for What Comes Next
summary_en: This is a working reflection on the future of higher education and what it may require of institutions like Butler. It is intentionally provocative in places and is not a plan or a set of decisions. Rather, it reflects the level of ambition I believe this moment demands. I share it in the spirit of…
author: james m. danko
title_cn: 高校尚未做好应对后续事态的准备

title: Why Attend an Overnight Pre-College Program
summary_en: Ready to experience college life beyond the campus tour? Here are three reasons why you should consider an overnight pre-college program experience as a high schooler.
author: Victoria Ochs
title_cn: 为何参加住宿制大学预科项目
